name: Travel-Dealz
notes: 德语高质量旅行折扣编辑站，适合监控航班、酒店、邮轮、套餐和里程优惠。

name: Urlaubspiraten
access: Public RSS feed with images and rich descriptions.
notes: 德国假日折扣密度很高，常见从德国机场出发的酒店+机票、家庭、全包、邮轮信息。

name: Urlaubstracker
notes: 低价酒店、度假套餐、Spa/周末短途信息较多，适合德国和欧洲周边。

name: mydealz Reisen
access: Public Pepper RSS feed; includes merchant and price metadata.
notes: 社区折扣信号强，适合捕捉 TUI、l'tur、MSC、Travelcircus 等平台的临时券和用户发现。

name: Berlin.de Events
access: Official Berlin.de RSS feed linked from the events page.
notes: 柏林官方活动信息，适合周末、节庆、城市活动。

name: Berlin.de Highlights
access: Official Berlin.de RSS feed linked from the events page.
notes: 更偏活动合集和月份指南，适合快速找本周/本月柏林有趣活动。

name: visitBerlin Event Calendar
access: Public HTML event list; parsed with Cheerio selectors.
notes: 活动粒度更细，包含日期、地点、票务链接。HTML 结构未来可能变化，因此保留错误监控。

name: Urlaubsguru
access: RSS endpoint currently requires basic authentication from this environment.
notes: 内容质量高，但公开抓取受限；后续可改成邮件订阅、授权 API 或人工收藏入口。

name: Travelzoo Deutschland
access: No stable public feed confirmed; site may require browser rendering.
notes: Top 20 deal value is high; later consider newsletter parsing or browser adapter.

name: TUI Last Minute
access: Public HTML offer pages; final prices require date, airport and traveller selections.
notes: 官方 Last Minute Sale 适合监控 40%-50% 的机酒/酒店优惠，尤其是 Kanaren、Turkey、Egypt 等家庭全包方向。

name: Secret Escapes
access: Browser-rendered pages and member pricing; best handled with manual review or browser adapter.
notes: 适合找高星酒店、Spa、近郊短住和全包套餐，但需要登录/JS 和家庭房二次核验。

name: Travelcircus Wellness
access: Public HTML pages with package cards; prices change by dates and travellers.
notes: 柏林周边和德国短住价值高，尤其是 Tropical Islands、温泉、乐园+酒店套餐。

name: Lidl Reisen
access: Public HTML pages; search results depend on dates and party size.
notes: 适合发现德国境内 40%-50% Last Minute 酒店短住，但空调、宝宝设施和距离需要严格核对。

name: HolidayCheck TUI Deals
access: Public deal pages; best used as review and price cross-check.
notes: 适合把 TUI/airtours 优惠与住客评价、儿童设施和酒店风险放在一起核验。

name: Groupon Berlin
access: Requires careful HTML/browser adapter and anti-bot monitoring.
notes: 柏林本地打折活动很重要，但一期先作为候选，避免不稳定抓取影响主流程。

name: Eventbrite Berlin
access: Best through official API or curated search pages.
notes: 适合补充免费/低价活动；后续如需要可配置 API token。

name: Fever Berlin
access: Likely browser-rendered; no stable feed confirmed.
notes: 沉浸式展览和亲子体验多，后续适合做浏览器自动化或手动收藏。

name: Center Parcs Angebote
access: No public RSS confirmed; direct offer pages need custom adapter.
notes: 非常适合带小孩的短途度假村监控，建议二期单独做价格/日期抓取。
